title: Vindicate

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Judge my cause, O Light Divine
In this darkness, make me shine
Through the storms of doubt and pain
Let Your truth remain

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Send Your light to guide my way
Through the shadows of today
To Your holy mountain high
Where Your presence lies

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lead me to Your altar, Lord
Where my joy finds restoration
Let me praise You with my song
Till my spirit finds its home
In Your holy habitation

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Why so downcast, O my soul?
Why this turmoil deep within?
Put your hope in God alone
He will lift you up again
I will praise You through the night
Till the morning brings its light
You're my fortress, You're my strength
My deliverance

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lead me to Your altar, Lord
Where my joy finds restoration
Let me praise You with my song
Till my spirit finds its home
In Your holy habitation

epigraph: O send out thy light and thy truth
